evidence_cited.summary: HK-0004 architectural-discovery: in-repo workflow missing Steps 0.5/1d/3d
sprints.json now has 13 entries; Sprint 13 appended

description: Plan amendment: append Sprint 13 (Phase 1.6 — Workflow-step port and governance hardening) to sprints.json with three deliverables: (a) port Steps 0.5/1d/3a-3e/3d and Operational Notes from cached v0.3.3 harness-sprint/SKILL.md into in-repo sprint-workflow/SKILL.md, closing HK-0004; (b) add pre-sprint council-check gate to workflow Step 0 per Architect P-05, closing HK-0003; (c) formal SN2 carve-out for renumbering-only edits to approved markdown contracts, applied by fixing stale Sprint 9/10/11 references in sprint-07.md and sprint-08.md per Scope Guardian #5a. Phase 1.6 section added to spec.md mirroring Phase 1.5 structure. Inserted at end (Sprint 13) so Phase 2 (Sprints 10-12) completes without further plan perturbation. User ratification via post-Sprint-9 council fan-out AskUserQuestion answers (Q1=new small sprint, Q2=council-check gate, Q3=SN2 carve-out, Q4=proceed to Sprint 10). This collapses nemawashi Stages 1-3 into the council fan-out alignment from architect + scope-guardian + henkaten-detector, with Stage 4 ratification via the user's explicit selection of the recommended options.
